case_title: SWIFT, SHARON MURPHY VS KUHEN, CAROL L.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUHEN, CAROL L.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KUHEN, CAROL L. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SWIFT, SHARON MURPHY $1,821.49 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,844.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO SHARON SWIFT, NO INFORMA- TION OF DELIVERY OF CLAIM RECORDED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUHEN, CAROL L. PLTF FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,666.70 FILED BY SWIFT, SHARON MURPHY AS TO DEFENDANT KUHEN, CAROL L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
